items.title: Microsoft called Linux a cancer, now ships its own free distro that's nothing like Ubuntu or Fedora
items.dek: Microsoft CEO and incontinent over-stater of facts Steve Ballmer said that "Linux is a cancer that attaches itself in an intellectual property sense to everythi
items.body: Microsoft CEO and incontinent over-stater of facts Steve Ballmer said that "Linux is a cancer that attaches itself in an intellectual property sense to everything it touches," during a commercial spot masquerading as a interview with the Chicago Sun-Times on June 1, 2001. Now, they are making Linux distro ,and most of their enterprise clients prefer Linux on Azure! submitted by /u/Special-Midnight-152 [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Fitness brand founder and Olympian Les Mills dies aged 91
items.dek: The Les Mills International brand is now known globally for choreographed workouts set to music, like Body Pump and Body Combat.
items.body: The Les Mills International brand is now known globally for choreographed workouts set to music, like Body Pump and Body Combat.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders on fame, pressure and World Cup fever
items.dek: As the Netflix show following their lives returns, the squad open up about their new-found fame.
items.body: As the Netflix show following their lives returns, the squad open up about their new-found fame.
